# Thomas Reid

*1710 – 1796 · Scottish*

Scottish philosopher, founder of the common-sense school, defender of agent causation: a person is a first cause, able to initiate their acts without being necessitated to them.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
